recommendations.title: 22 packages losing momentum
recommendations.detail: @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @ai-rpg-engine/content-schema, @ai-rpg-engine/equipment and 19 more show sustained decline. Consider: release updates, fix open issues, or update documentation.

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.77 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 91% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 5 packages gaining traction
recommendations.detail: @world-forge/export-ai-rpg, @world-forge/schema, @world-forge/renderer-2d show organic growth with download spikes. Capitalize with blog posts, social media, or conference talks.

actionableAdvice.title: 76 packages in critical health
actionableAdvice.detail: mcpt, file-compass, voice-soundboard, brain-dev, mcp-stress-test scored below 20/100.
actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: 1 package in rapid decline
actionableAdvice.action: Check for competing packages, broken releases, or ecosystem changes. Push a patch release or announcement.

actionableAdvice.title: 2 packages surging
actionableAdvice.action: Capitalize now: write a blog post, tweet, or submit to newsletters. Post a "Thank you" issue or discussion.

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.77 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 91% of traffic from npm
actionableAdvice.detail: Single-registry dependency increases blast radius if npm has outages or policy changes.
actionableAdvice.action: Cross-publish key packages to PyPI (via wrapper) or NuGet. Add install instructions for all registries in READMEs.

actionableAdvice.title: 18 packages with untapped potential
actionableAdvice.detail: @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @ai-rpg-engine/content-schema, @ai-rpg-engine/equipment have active users but stalled growth.
actionableAdvice.action: Add new features, improve docs, or create tutorials. Small efforts can shift these from D to C+ quickly.
